Plan Inquiry and Assistance.description: Assisting users with inquiries about phone plans, including capabilities, current plans, upgrades, family plans, data plans, billing issues, and add-ons.
user_actions: Asks about Bot's Capabilities or Phone Plans
Requests Help with Mobile Plan or Has Questions About Current Plan
Specific Upgrade Request or Interested in Family Plans
Inquires about Data Plan or Plan Details
Provides Account Info Directly or Asks About Special Offers
General Inquiry about Data Left or Wants to Upgrade Plan
Asks About Add-ons for Family Plan
bot_actions: Describes Capabilities and Lists Available Phone Plans
Provides Information on Current Plan or Specific Plan or Service Needs
Offers Specific Plan Upgrades or Describes Family Plan Options
Asks for Account Details or Helps Resolve Billing Issue
Provides Data Plan Info or Details Specific Plan Features
Informs About Current Promotions or Unable to Provide Data Usage

Decision and Finalization.description: Finalizing users' decisions on plan sign-up, upgrades, or providing further assistance based on their satisfaction or additional needs.
user_actions: Decides on Plan Sign-Up, Upgrade Confirmation, or Needs Further Assistance
Expresses Satisfaction, Dissatisfaction, or Ends Conversation
bot_actions: Finalizes Sign-Up or Plan Changes, Proceeds with Upgrade
Provides Additional Support, Information, and Addresses Dissatisfaction/Problems
Directs to Customer Service for Complex Queries or Concludes with More Help Offer
